mapper.select: SELECT * FROM camera_config ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO camera_config (camera_code, camera_name, enterprise, artemis_device_id, rtsp_url, location, enabled, scenario) KEY (camera_code) VALUES (#{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{enterprise}, #{artemisDeviceId}, #{rtspUrl}, #{location}, #{enabled}, #{scenario})

INSERT INTO camera_config (camera_code, camera_name, enterprise, artemis_device_id, rtsp_url, location, enabled, scenario) VALUES (#{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{enterprise}, #{artemisDeviceId}, #{rtspUrl}, #{location}, #{enabled}, #{scenario}) ON CONFLICT (camera_code) DO UPDATE SET camera_name = EXCLUDED.camera_name, enterprise = EXCLUDED.enterprise, artemis_device_id = EXCLUDED.artemis_device_id, rtsp_url = EXCLUDED.rtsp_url, location = EXCLUDED.location, enabled = EXCLUDED.enabled, scenario = EXCLUDED.scenario, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE camera_config SET camera_name = #{cameraName}, enterprise = #{enterprise}, artemis_device_id = #{artemisDeviceId}, rtsp_url = #{rtspUrl}, location = #{location}, enabled = #{enabled}, scenario = #{scenario}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1
SELECT * FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND scenario = #{scenario} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND scenario = #{scenario}
